title: Felix and the Hidden Treasure
original_title: Félix et le trésor de Morgäa
overview: Taking advantage of his mother's absence as she departs on a cruise ship for some rest and relaxation, 12-year-old Félix sets out to find his father, a fisherman who disappeared at sea two years earlier.
